sections.paragraph:
Original: זוּע

Transliteration: zûa‛

Phonetic: zoo'-ah

BDB Definition:

  1. to tremble, quiver, quake, be in terror
    1. (Qal) to tremble, quake
    2. (Pilpel)
      1. to shake violently
      2. to cause to tremble

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 540

Part(s) of speech: Verb
